case_title: BEN ALTRECHE VS. GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-18-2009 CONTINUED TO AUG-17-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-18-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
